command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute 
SELECT COUNT(*) as senza_firma FROM linkedin_posts 
WHERE postText NOT LIKE '%Andrea Cinelli%';

UPDATE linkedin_posts 
SET postText = CONCAT(
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(postText, '#', 1),
  '\nAndrea Cinelli | Founder, IDEASMART\n',
  CONCAT('#', SUBSTRING(postText, LOCATE('#', postText) + 1))
)
WHERE postText NOT LIKE '%Andrea Cinelli%'
  AND postText LIKE '%#%';
